description: 10 detailed JSON image generation prompts for the 'SAS is dead' campaign. Each prompt injects the complete Visual DNA (palette, typography, composition, effects) and references specific seed images from the gallery.

visual_dna_refs.subject: Joe Perkins — middle-aged male, salt-and-pepper hair, groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Thumbnail Hero
prompts.concept: LinkedIn thumbnail for the SAS is dead post. Bold confrontational opener with Joe Perkins as the authoritative figure.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt, looking directly at camera with a stoic, confrontational expression. Seated pose, relaxed but authoritative.

foreground_elements.font: Impact, Helvetica Compressed, or Bebas Neue

prompt.style_descriptor: Bold confrontational LinkedIn thumbnail, high-contrast yellow on charcoal, industrial minimalist, Swiss design influence

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Quote Card Portrait
prompts.concept: Quote card with Joe in focus rectangle style. The SAS acronym reframe takes center stage.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt. Direct gaze, neutral stoic expression. Cut out from original background.

foreground_elements.note: Subject's arms and head break the rectangle boundary — 'thinks outside the box' metaphor

foreground_elements.content: More variations of the same unremarkable creative. Faster. Cheaper. More.

prompt.style_descriptor: Focus rectangle quote card, yellow accent frame, duotone treatment, matte industrial aesthetic

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Full Poster (Text Sandwich)
prompts.concept: Full poster with Joe between layers of typography. The 'sandwich' layering technique creates 3D depth.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt. Seated on black metal stool, legs crossed, hands resting casually. Direct eye contact, neutral confident expression.

background.note: Flat matte finish, no gradient on flat areas

foreground_elements.note: Creates 3D sandwich pop-out effect with subject between text layers

foreground_elements.content: When production becomes free, taste becomes the only thing worth charging for.

prompt.style_descriptor: Text sandwich poster, 3D pop-out layering, yellow/grey split horizon, Swiss design, industrial studio

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Stippled Duotone Portrait
prompts.concept: Gritty street-art style. Joe's portrait overlaid with SAS typography in a distressed wheat-paste aesthetic.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard. Portrait bust framing, direct confrontational gaze.

foreground_elements.content: SAS SAS SAS SAS SAS SAS SAS

prompt.style_descriptor: Gritty street-art duotone, stippled portrait, distressed wheat-paste, confrontational underground zine aesthetic

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Yellow Neon on Black
prompts.concept: Pure typographic statement. Maximum contrast. The reframe lives in the text alone.

prompt.subject: None — pure typographic graphic

background.note: No texture, no gradient — pure void

foreground_elements.font: Helvetica Compressed Black, Impact, or Bebas Neue
Helvetica Compressed Black, Impact, or Bebas Neue
foreground_elements.note: The period creates finality and urgency

effects.note: Neon effect achieved purely through color theory — simultaneous contrast

prompt.style_descriptor: Pure typographic statement, neon yellow on deep charcoal, maximum contrast, Swiss industrial, flat design

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — LinkedIn Banner
prompts.concept: Wide-format LinkedIn banner. Joe centered with SAS IS DEAD overlaid. Professional yet confrontational.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt. Full-body seated on black metal stool, arms relaxed at sides, direct eye contact. Centered.

background.note: Full-width yellow field — maximum brand presence

foreground_elements.content: When the hiding place gets automated away.

prompt.style_descriptor: LinkedIn banner, full-width yellow field, centered subject, bold industrial streetwear aesthetic

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Focus Rectangle Duotone
prompts.concept: Sharp rectangular focus box. Inside: sharp yellow-highlighted Joe. Outside: blurred greyscale. The box = AI clarity.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt. Medium close-up, direct gaze.

foreground_elements.note: Inside the box: sharp subject with yellow color cast. Outside: greyscale blur.

foreground_elements.content: SAS never had the taste to fill it.

prompt.style_descriptor: Selective focus rectangle, duotone yellow/charcoal inside box, greyscale blur outside, cinematic tech editorial

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Isometric Diagram
prompts.concept: Information design / infographic style. The SAS→taste reframe visualized as a process flow.

prompt.subject: None — pure infographic/diagram

foreground_elements.content: 'The bottleneck was never production. It was taste.'

prompt.style_descriptor: Vertical process flow diagram, industrial yellow on matte grey, Swiss information design, isometric iconography

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Yellow Glow Spotlight
prompts.concept: Cinematic. Yellow spotlight from behind Joe's head creates a halo. The glow = the future; the grey = what's dying.

prompt.subject: Middle-aged male with salt-and-pepper hair and groomed beard, black crew-neck t-shirt. Medium close-up, looking slightly upward, stoic visionary expression. Low-angle camera position (worm's eye).

background.note: Yellow rim light catches the left side of subject's hair and face

prompt.style_descriptor: Cinematic low-angle portrait, yellow spotlight halo, noir-industrial aesthetic, editorial tech visionary

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Brand Mark Composition
prompts.concept: Pure brand statement. The Rubik's cube (Systems Thinking) overtakes the SAS acronym. Geometric, architectural, minimal.

prompt.subject: None — pure geometric brand composition

background.note: Deep charcoal void — maximum contrast canvas

foreground_elements.note: SAS letters fading/dissolving — the old model being replaced
Yellow tiles form the path/shape of 'TASTE' across the cube faces

foreground_elements.content: THE ONLY THING WORTH CHARGING FOR.

prompt.style_descriptor: Pure brand mark composition, isometric Rubik's cube with yellow active path forming 'TASTE', dissolving SAS, maximum contrast, architectural minimalism

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Typographic Pure (v2)
prompts.notes: Pure typographic poster. Yellow #FDE910 on charcoal #1A1A1B. 'SAS IS DEAD.' stacked. Rubik's cube icon. 1:1. Best brand alignment score achieved.

prompt.subject: None — pure typographic graphic
prompt.background: solid #1A1A1B charcoal, no texture, no gradient
foreground: 'SAS' massive #FDE910 Impact Condensed Black, stacked above 'IS DEAD.' same color
Small isometric Rubik's cube bottom-right: #FDE910/#9B9B9B/#1A1A1B
prompt.effects: matte finish, zero shadows/glow/gradients, maximum contrast simultaneous color theory

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Graffiti Sandwich (v3)
prompts.notes: Street-art Z-axis sandwich. 'SAS' stencil behind Joe, 'IS DEAD.' over his chest. Split yellow/charcoal horizon. Textbook sandwich composition. Most street-authentic.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, direct confrontational gaze, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
foreground: 'SAS' massive stencil in #FDE910 behind subject
'IS DEAD.' in charcoal #1A1A1B in front of subject chest — Z-axis sandwich
prompt.effects: matte, zero gloss, slight yellow duotone on subject face

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Duotone Focus Rectangle (v4)
prompts.notes: Vertical focus box — Joe sharp inside, grey blur outside. 'SAS' breaks top boundary. Most 'AI lens/surveillance' aesthetic. Unique composition not in prior gallery.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged, salt-and-pepper hair, groomed beard, intense direct stare, black t-shirt.
prompt.background: solid #1A1A1B charcoal, gaussian blur grey #9B9B9B outside focus box
foreground: Vertical focus rectangle center-right, 2px #FDE910 stroke, transparent fill
Subject sharp inside box with yellow tint, blurred outside
'SAS' massive #FDE910 above breaking top boundary
'IS DEAD.' in grey below
Rubik's cube bottom-right
prompt.effects: duotone inside box, gaussian blur outside, matte

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Industrial Manifesto (v5)
prompts.notes: Swiss grid. Vertical text column left, Joe silhouette right. Grey #939598 background. Most restrained/editorial. Gap in prior gallery: pure grey-background composition.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged, salt-and-pepper crew-cut hair, full grey beard, serious authoritative expression, black t-shirt.
foreground: Left: vertical text column — 'SAS' then 'IS DEAD.' then 'when taste becomes the only edge.' in #FDE910 Impact Condensed
Right: Joe as sharp silhouette with yellow edge highlight
Thin 2px vertical yellow rule separating columns
prompt.effects: matte, flat silhouette, Swiss design precision

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — The Kill Bill (v6)
prompts.notes: Arms-crossed confrontational Joe. Graffiti 'SAS' with head breaking letter A. 'THE ART OF THE QUICK KILL' monospace bottom-left. Heavy film grain. Most aggressive/confrontational. North Star asset.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper textured hair, full groomed beard, wearing a black t-shirt.
foreground: Joe waist-up arms crossed, intense stare — hero
Graffiti 'SAS' #FDE910 with Joe's head breaking through letter A
'IS DEAD.' #FDF21C below
'THE ART OF THE QUICK KILL' monospace small #9B9B9B bottom-left
Rubik's cube bottom-right
2px #FDE910 border frame entire composition
prompt.effects: heavy film grain, sharp rectangular mask, matte, zero shadows

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Episode Thumbnail (v7)
prompts.notes: Episode-style thumbnail — yellow top field (#FDE910), grey bottom (#939598), 'SAS IS DEAD.' knocked out of yellow, Joe lower third, '01' behind shoulder, Rubik's cube. Gap in prior gallery: no episode thumbnail format.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, direct confrontational gaze, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
prompt.background: top 55%: solid #FDE910 matte. bottom 45%: solid #939598 matte.
foreground: 'SAS IS DEAD.' knocked out of yellow field, #1A1A1B charcoal, Impact Black, upper-center
Joe chest-up, lower third, slightly desaturated, sharp
Bold '01' behind left shoulder, low opacity
Isometric Rubik's cube bottom-right on grey field
prompt.effects: matte, zero shadows/glow/grain, Swiss editorial meets YouTube thumbnail

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Surveillance Dossier (v8)
prompts.notes: Surveillance/dossier style — dark textured background, viewfinder frame around Joe's eyes, horizontal scan line through pupils, 'SAS' massive yellow above, technical mono labels bottom-left ('SUBJECT: SAS PARADIGM // STATUS: TERMINATED // 2024'), Rubik's cube. Brand surveillance aesthetic perfected.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, direct intense stare, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
foreground: Rectangular viewfinder frame 2px #FDE910 around eyes, thin horizontal scan line through pupils
'SAS' massive #FDE910 Impact Condensed above frame
'IS DEAD.' #9B9B9B grey below frame
'SUBJECT: SAS PARADIGM // STATUS: TERMINATED // 2024' monospace tiny bottom-left
Rubik's cube bottom-right
prompt.effects: matte, no glow, surveillance scan aesthetic

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Systems Diagram (v9)
prompts.notes: Isometric vertical flowchart — TOP node: grey 'SAS' (old system), MIDDLE node: yellow 'IS DEAD.' (transition), BOTTOM node: yellow 'TASTE.' (new paradigm). Joe's face emerges from bottom node as origin point. Vertical mono labels left/right. Grey background. Swiss technical aesthetic. Gap: no prior generated diagram with Joe integrated.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, looking slightly upward with a visionary expression.
foreground: Vertical isometric flowchart — TOP grey node: 'SAS', MIDDLE yellow node: 'IS DEAD.', BOTTOM yellow largest: 'TASTE.'
Joe's head/shoulders emerging from behind bottom node — eyes sharp
Left mono labels: 'LEGACY: abundance without taste.', right: 'FRONTIER: taste as the only moat.'
Isometric Rubik's cube small bottom-right
prompt.effects: matte, zero shadows, Swiss technical aesthetic

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Split Body (v10)
SAS IS DEAD — Center-Stack: SAS IS DEAD (v21)
prompts.notes: Algorithm 2 center-stack. Full yellow field, Joe desaturated flat center-frame, 'SAS IS DEAD.' black on yellow horizontal band across mid-frame — knockout style. 9.8/10 — near perfect center-lock.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, deadpan confrontational gaze, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
prompt.background: Full #FDE910 yellow field — matte, zero texture.
prompt.joe_treatment: Desaturated flat greyscale — no shadow no highlight — center-frame chest-up.
prompt.typography: Horizontal band across center third: 'SAS' massive #1A1A1B charcoal Impact Black ALL CAPS — knocked out of the yellow band. 'IS DEAD.' solid charcoal below — tight.
prompt.rubiks_cube: Tiny bottom-right — grey and yellow facets.

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Center-Stack: Bottleneck (v22)
prompts.notes: Algorithm 2 center-stack. Vertical center split charcoal/yellow, Joe duotone straddling seam, 'THE BOTTLENECK / WAS NEVER PRODUCTION. / IT WAS TASTE.' stacked center-locked. 9.8/10 — Z-axis split perfectly executed.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, looking slightly upward with a knowing expression, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
prompt.background: Vertical center split — LEFT #1A1A1B charcoal, RIGHT #FDE910 yellow.
prompt.joe_treatment: Duotone — #FDE910 highlights right side, #1A1A1B shadow left — straddling the seam.
prompt.typography: Center-locked stack: 'THE BOTTLENECK' massive #FDE910 solid. 'WAS NEVER PRODUCTION.' smaller grey. 'IT WAS TASTE.' massive #1A1A1B charcoal — color-inverted text across the seam.
prompt.effects: matte, zero shadows, color-inversion on text across seam

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Center-Stack: Ship Taste (v23)
prompts.notes: Algorithm 2 center-stack. Film grain grey, backlit silhouette Joe, 'THEY / SHIP TASTE.' yellow stacked, monospace 'SUBJECT: TASTE // STATUS: SHIPPED // 2026' bar across center on Joe. 10/10 — every element perfect.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, arms slightly open as if presenting, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
prompt.background: #939598 grey flat matte — fine film grain overlay — tactile.
prompt.joe_treatment: Backlit silhouette — #FDE910 rim light on edges, body near-black — no facial detail — center-frame.
prompt.typography: 'THEY' massive #FDE910 solid. 'SHIP TASTE.' massive #FDE910 solid below. Monospace label band: #1A1A1B charcoal bar across center — 'SUBJECT: TASTE // STATUS: SHIPPED // 2026' white monospace inside.
prompt.effects: matte, film grain, rim light on Joe only

prompts.name: SAS IS DEAD — Center-Stack: Your Move (v24)
prompts.notes: Algorithm 2 center-stack. Dual field yellow/charcoal, Joe partially cropped center-frame, 'YOUR MOVE.' white on charcoal bar that crosses Joe's chest/neck. 8/10 — bar positioned on chest rather than across face as intended. Z-layers correct.

prompt.subject: Image one is a detailed photograph of the man — middle-aged with salt-and-pepper short cropped hair, full groomed boxed beard and mustache, chin slightly raised, deadpan stare, wearing a black crew-neck t-shirt.
prompt.background: Dual field — top 60% #FDE910 yellow, bottom 40% #1A1A1B charcoal — sharp horizontal divide center-frame.
prompt.joe_treatment: Partially cropped at shoulders — floating center — flat matte greyscale.
prompt.typography: #1A1A1B charcoal rectangle bar runs across center — bold WHITE ALL CAPS 'YOUR MOVE.' inside — bar sits ON JOE's face/chin area — text in front of Joe.
prompt.rubiks_cube: Tiny bottom-right — grey and yellow facets.
prompt.effects: matte, zero shadows, Z-axis front-bar on Joe
